   "reasoning": "In times of crisis, you need to spend to save. I'm pouring money into funding boosts and teacher incentives to stem the hemorrhage. Transparency reports will help us keep stakeholders honest, while resource reallocation helps us squeeze value from existing resources. And, of course, a bit of student scholarship support never hurts, but let's not over commit - attendance mandates will be a tough sell with teachers burning out.",
